strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across multiple languages and frameworks (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java, Kotlin, Dlang)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Strong problem-solving skills demonstrated through diverse projects (GIS platform, real-time systems, investment tools)
concerns: Lack of explicit mention of Nest.js experience in primary stack
No clear evidence of Vitest or Playwright testing framework usage in resume
Limited detail on cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) and Kubernetes experience in recent roles
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates exceptional fullstack versatility with 10+ years of experience across diverse technologies, including recent AI-agent infrastructure development. While her resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, her adaptability and depth in backend/frontend systems, plus her leadership in open-source projects and developer tooling, strongly outweigh these concerns. The primary gap lies in direct alignment with the specified primary stack, but her extensive polyglot experience suggests rapid upskilling potential.
